visual.composition: Four centered text blocks stacked vertically from promise to urgency.
visual.layout: Pink headline at top, explanatory pink text in middle, guarantee claim below, red urgency line at bottom.
visual.typography: Large rounded hand-drawn uppercase lettering with neon-like glow.

copy.headline: KAYBEDERSEN PARANI GERI VERIYORUZ
copy.subheadline: SPOR TAHMİNLERİ VE OYUN TAKTİKLERİ VERİYORUZ 💡
copy.language_quality: Turkish copy appears legible; guarantee-style wording requires compliance review.

marketing.audience: Turkish-speaking users interested in sports predictions or game tactics, inferred from visible copy.
marketing.value_proposition: Sports predictions and game tactics are presented alongside a stated refund/no-loss promise.
claims_requiring_verification: Claim that no money can be lost

weaknesses: Guarantee-style claims pose material compliance risk
No terms or proof are visible
test_ideas: Test a compliant informational value proposition without no-loss wording
Test a clear, substantiated support message

uncertainties: Refund and availability conditions are absent
